title: Multiple public types missing Debug derive
description:
Standards require Debug on almost everything. These public types lack Debug and could trivially derive it:
- PostRow (post.rs:74) — only has sqlx::FromRow
- SignatureParts (signatures.rs:101) — no derives at all
- RateLimiter (ratelimit.rs:6) — no derives
- WebhookPayload (webhook.rs:13) — only Deserialize
- WebhookMedia (webhook.rs:21) — only Deserialize

AppState and ActorKeyCache also lack Debug but contain types (SqlitePool, reqwest::Client, Mutex) that complicate deriving — those would need manual impls or #[debug(skip)] with a helper crate.
close_reason: Added Debug derives to SignatureParts, PostRow, WebhookPayload, WebhookMedia
